-jfx-button-type.description: The visual type of the button, either flat or raised with shadow.

-jfx-cell-limit.description: The maximum number of suggestion cells to display in the popup.

-jfx-checked-color.description: The fill color of the checkbox when checked.

-jfx-default-color.description: The accent color used for the picker overlay header and selection.

-jfx-dialog-transition.description: The entrance transition animation for the dialog.

-jfx-disable-animation.appliesTo: JFXComboBox, JFXColorPicker, JFXRadioButton, JFXTabPane, JFXTextArea, JFXTextField, JFXToggleButton, JFXToggleNode
-jfx-disable-animation.description: Whether to disable transition animations on the control.

-jfx-disable-visual-focus.description: Whether to disable the visual focus indicator on the control.

-jfx-expanded.description: Whether the list view is in expanded mode showing sub-lists.

-jfx-focus-color.description: The line color when the control has focus.

-jfx-indicator-position.description: The position of the value indicator relative to the slider thumb.

-jfx-label-float.description: Whether the prompt text floats above the field when focused or filled.

-jfx-mask-type.description: The shape of the ripple clip mask.

-jfx-offset.description: The horizontal offset between path buttons in the tree view breadcrumb bar.

-jfx-overlay.description: Whether the picker content is shown as a fullscreen overlay dialog.

-jfx-radius.description: The radius of the spinner arc.

-jfx-rippler-disabled.description: Whether the ripple effect is disabled.

-jfx-rippler-fill.description: The fill color of the ripple effect.

-jfx-rippler-radius.description: The radius of the ripple effect circle.

-jfx-rippler-recenter.description: Whether the ripple effect animates from the center of the control instead of the click point.

-jfx-selected-color.description: The color of the radio button when selected.

-jfx-size.description: The size of the toggle button circle or the preferred size of the SVG glyph.

-jfx-starting-angle.description: The starting angle in degrees for the spinner arc.

-jfx-toggle-color.description: The color of the toggle button circle when toggled on.

-jfx-toggle-line-color.description: The color of the toggle button track when toggled on.

-jfx-unchecked-color.description: The border color of the checkbox when unchecked.

-jfx-unfocus-color.description: The line color when the control does not have focus.

-jfx-unselected-color.description: The color of the radio button when unselected.

-jfx-untoggle-color.description: The color of the toggle button circle when toggled off.

-jfx-untoggle-line-color.description: The color of the toggle button track when toggled off.

-jfx-vertical-gap.description: The vertical gap between list cells.
